title: Choose a plan
headline: Full access to all features
subtitle: Vocabulary, clue words, topic practice, explanations, and mock exams. Only the access duration changes.

free.name: Free Preview
free.description: Try the app without any commitment.

signInRequiredBody: Please log in or create an account to purchase access.
activeSubBody: You already have an active subscription.
checkoutFailedBody: Could not start checkout. Please try again.
errorLoginAgain: Session verified, but you need to log in again to refresh your subscription.
errorVerifyFailed: Could not verify payment. Please contact support.
successBody: Your subscription is now active. Enjoy full access to all features.
cancelBody: No worries — you can try again whenever you are ready.
